label: Riftshade Hearthroom
description: Riftshade Hearthroom is a compact domestic chamber set within the interlocked hab-tiers of Vespera Tertius Nocturnis Bastion, its walls poured in slagcrete and faced with soot-dark panels to resist ash infiltration. A recessed heat-niche of black vitrified stone anchors the room, its fluework routed into the bastion’s sealed service voids to prevent stormback draft. Narrow, armored view-slits carry auroral spill as a bruise-colored sheen across worn furnishings and stenciled devotional placards. The ceiling is crossed by shielded conduit runs and a redundant vox baffle, reflecting the city’s permanent interference and overbuilt life-support doctrine.
